texto: Life is happening at this very moment
autor: it is not behind us or before us. The past is full of memories and future is full of expectations.
explicacao: Citação de it is not behind us or before us. The past is full of memories and future is full of expectations. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Life is happening at this very moment” articula reflexao, debasish-mridha, happening em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
